title: Prioritize Eligible High-Priority Beads In Scheduler
description: Update scheduler candidate ordering so eligible high-priority beads are selected before normal-priority beads while preserving creation order within each priority tier and still honoring dependency/conflict rules.
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler sorts only within the already-eligible pool; dependency and conflict checks remain unchanged.
High-priority ready beads are chosen before earlier-created normal-priority ready beads in the same scheduling cycle.
Creation-timestamp order is preserved among high-priority beads and among normal-priority beads.
Scheduler behavior for non-priority cases remains unchanged.
